message:
feat(core): add three-lane scheduler architecture with admission policy (ft-2p9cb.2.1.1)

Implements B1 spec for the AARSP three-lane scheduler:
- SchedulerLane: Input/Control/Bulk with strict priority ordering
- stage_to_lane(): maps pipeline stages to scheduling lanes
- LaneSchedulerConfig: queue capacities, CPU shares, pressure thresholds
- LaneScheduler: admission, completion, epoch management, deadline promotion
- AdmissionDecision: Admitted/Deferred/Shed/Promoted
- Input immunity: input items never shed, bulk items shed under input pressure
- 21 new unit tests (203 total), all 81 proptests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
